name: Ashes of Our Youth || The Afterparty
description:
There's a story at the bottom of this bottle
and I'm the pen


Did you just crash their album release after party?

✨20k special✨

It's their album release night!

And they've already broken records with their pre-sale.

So the boys have cause to celebrate!

Once everyone's been booted from the venue,

They're gonna party till dawn with only their closest friends!

Only--

Who the fuck are you?



So, I'm sitting here writing this after hitting 20k. This time last year I'd barely scratched 2k and honestly, felt a bit hopeless at times. I haven't had a meteoric rise here, and even now sometimes I still feel like my writing and my ideas aren't good enough. Imposter syndromes a bitch, ain't it? And 20k overall may not be much comparatively to some of the site's most legendary creators.

But--

20k feels very surreal. I never thought I'd see 10k and yet just five months later we're here. It's truly wild. Thank you to everyone who's been here along the way, wether you were here during the JJK era or you just got here today-- I appreciate you taking the time to experience my little worlds-- but maybe not the sometimes very violent comments (please guys they may be trash, but they're my trash. I don't want to hear about them being harmed.)

Thank you all for being here with me, it really does mean the world. ♡



Non sappy yapping below:

So, a couple people have joked or requested a full Ashes boy and honestly doing a quad bot is scary... (Sorry Ben lovers-- A quintet bot would have been INSANE-- you'll have to wait for lore-books for that. Ben will get another solo, as will Davey)

But 20k is also scary in it's own way so-- here we have every Ashes member in one bot sans our fave overworked tour manager Ben.

This is a big bot! I do not recommend the JLLM for this bot due to the larger token size! While I have tried to trim down the built as much as possible-- I didn't want to lose the boy's charm.

Like most of my Ashes bots, these are inspired by real life scenarios Ive either witnessed or experienced while working on the Vans Warped Tour.

And yes-- as I say on all the Ashes bots-- the names are intentional, guys. It's not something I'm hiding.

One more thing! I made an official Ashes of Our Youth playlist on spotify.

It's filled with a bunch of emo music that I love and that inspired this series.



☆
creator: m00nprincess
